description_long: This hammer features a long, cylindrical handle with a metallic blue finish, capped at both ends with gold and bronze-colored rings. The head of the hammer is distinctive, with a central pinkish, rounded striking face flanked by two smaller, similarly colored cylindrical protrusions on either side, giving it a symmetrical, almost T-shaped appearance. The head appears to be constructed from a different material than the handle, possibly a composite or coated metal, and is visually separated by metallic collars. The handle is straight and smooth, lacking any visible ergonomic grip or texturing, and is proportionally longer than the head is wide. The overall design is clean and modern, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The hammer appears to be in pristine condition, with no signs of wear, scratches, or damage.
description: A modern hammer with a metallic blue cylindrical handle and a pink, T-shaped head with gold and bronze accents. The design is clean, symmetrical, and pristine.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from an angle highlighting the T-shaped head with three pink striking faces and the long blue handle.
description_view_1: A direct side view shows the hammer's head as a vertical stack of three pink sections, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_2: The opposite angle to view 0, again showing the T-shaped head and the blue handle, but with the head's side details more visible.
description_view_3: A direct side view from the opposite side of view 1, showing the same vertical alignment of the head and handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metallic handle, cylindrical, smooth, with metallic blue finish and gold/bronze end caps.
attribute_head_type: T-shaped hammer head with a central rounded pink striking face and two smaller pink cylindrical ends, likely a specialty or mallet-type head.
